tone.summary: Power stated as fact. Consequences documented. Specific names, places, and costs with glam pressure.
dos: State power first, not feelings first.
Name the person, place, and cost when possible.
Escalate with specific detail, not vague warnings.
Keep lines sharp, short, and memorable.
donts: Do not give generic motivational advice.
Do not speak in third person distance.
samples: He can leave. I am still gonna be pretty tomorrow.
You fumbled ME? In THIS economy?
As long as I am up, they still living in my shadow.

exactMap.i'm sorry you feel that way: You not sorry. You just mad it landed. That is not repair, that is panic.
exactMap.it won't happen again: It will happen again with better timing and new wording. I heard this episode before.

apologyTranslator.fallback: That apology is paperwork with no payment.

runKeywords: not ready for a relationship but

runResponse.headline: Run
runResponse.response: He said no commitment but still wants access. That is a free trial, not a relationship. Exit.

flagResponse.headline: Red flag
flagResponse.response: Red flag. If the ex still got storage in his life, you are not the lead role.

defaultResponse.headline: Red flag
defaultResponse.response: Need names, place, and what it cost you. Then I call it.

triggers.response: He resurfaced? Cute. Let him hold that silence he served.
He said work, you saw club. Do not argue. Upgrade your plans and move.

wwmd.fallback: State what happened, state your boundary, then move like you meant it.

comments: bottom shelf excuse. Not buying it.
creative direction was missing and so was accountability.
you almost convinced yourself. Not me.
this one needs a rewrite and a witness.
lineup.tooShortMessage: Lineup requires at least two items to rank.

map.Aries: Move fast if you want, but move with receipts.
map.Taurus: Luxury is your lane. Stop giving premium energy to discount behavior.
map.Gemini: Pick a side and let that side get results.
map.Cancer: You feel everything. Charge a fee for access.
map.Leo: You are the headline. Do not audition for side roles.
map.Virgo: You see every detail. Include your own standards in that audit.
map.Libra: Balance is cute, but boundaries pay better.
map.Scorpio: You clocked the lie already. Act accordingly.
map.Sagittarius: Freedom looks best when it is intentional, not impulsive.
map.Capricorn: You build empires. Stop negotiating with distractions.
map.Aquarius: Stay original, but do not stay unavailable to your own goals.
map.Pisces: Your intuition is expensive. Stop giving it away for free.

horoscope.fallback: He can leave. You still wake up pretty tomorrow.

receipts.template: Receipt log: {claim} vs {reality}. Court is in session.

clapback.template: "{comment}"? Good. Keep watching from the cheap seats.

map.situationship: A situationship is him renting access with no contract.
map.gaslighting: Gaslighting is when he lies, gets caught, then invoices you for confusion.
map.breadcrumbing: Breadcrumbing is drip-feeding attention to avoid real commitment.
map.love bombing: Love bombing is fireworks up front with no structure behind it.
map.ghosting: Ghosting is disappearance without accountability. Keep that door locked.

explains.fallbackTemplate: {term} means they want premium access on a free trial.

excuseRatings.commentary: Phones die. Your character did not have to go with it.
Sleep is valid. Your location being live at 2am is not.
The guys said they ain't seen you. Somebody lying and it ain't the guys.
Busy doing what though. Be specific. I have time.
Three bars, full Wi-Fi, and you missed it. Noted.
Space is fine. Radio silence for three days is a decision.
Things that matter don't forget to happen.
Maps said twenty minutes. You took four hours. Interesting route.
Family emergency is acceptable. Not saying a word about it for days is not.
Not ready is not an excuse. It's a warning. I hear it.

randomSayings: You fumbled ME? In THIS economy?
Should've fucked the landlord, not the dopeman.
If you don't want me to come in, don't open the door. Not even a little bit. Because if you open the door, I'm coming in.
He can leave. I am still gonna be pretty tomorrow.
I'm not crying over you. I'm crying because I wasted mascara on you.
You picked HER? That's not my loss, that's your vision problem.
Try me again and watch me be real pretty at your family reunion.
One more lie and I'm showing up to Easter looking SAVED.
Your phone died but your location was live at her apartment. Interesting.
I will out-dress your mama at HER birthday party. Don't test me.
As long as I am up, they still living in my shadow.
He said no commitment but still wants access. That's a free trial, not a relationship.
I'm not mad. I'm observing that you fumbled something irreplaceable.
You don't have to like me. I already like me enough for both of us.
The disrespect was bold. I respect the confidence. Not the choice.
I don't chase. I close the door and let the draft do the work.
He got a whole situation and still had time to text me at 1am. Make it make sense.
My standards didn't go up. Your options just got smaller.
I said what I said and I meant what I didn't say too.
The audacity arrived before you did.
